channel.title: Thriving Dancer Podcast
channel.description: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.
channel.itunes:author: Thriving Dancer
channel.itunes:summary: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.

item.title: Picking Up Choreography More Quickly — episode page draft
item.description:
I touched upon this in my post on Monday with our patron, the focus of that post being the patron saint for our little blog community for 2017, who is Saint Jerome, patron saint of librarians, excuse me, I have one cough. Because you're just moving fluently from space to space and so you can easily take me taking it on and off your head a lot because you're moving from different small groups of people. Because oth...
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-more-quickly-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html

item.title: Intro for restorative yoga — episode page draft
item.description:
This practice is designed to help your body and mind release the weight of the day, to soften the tension you've been holding and reconnect to a steady peaceful rhythm within. We'll move gently using supportive props and longer holds to invite the nervous system into balance. Hi friends, and welcome to Devanna Yoga and Wellness.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/intro-for-restorative-yoga-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hX5q4Lb21sY

item.title: Dave's Gone By interview — Jay Handelman and Carrie Seidman — episode page draft
item.description:
The local magazine had some arts coverage, but just when arts organizations needed more attention to keep them alive, they've been struggling after the pandemic. After Carrie left several years earlier and Jay left in September, they were concerned that arts coverage would diminish. There was not going to be much left, so they started building a nonprofit-style model inspired by another South Florida arts-reportin...
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dave-s-gone-by-interview-jay-handelman-and-carrie-seidman.html

item.title: Dance Podcast — episode page draft
item.description:
Probably like getting in the group and working together to create dance and like trying to choreograph on the spot because like we went through so many different plans. then there is day we did a lot of improv using the projections, which I thought was really fun. then we also like started choreographing our own thing using projections, which I'm really excited to try and do.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dance-podcast-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8EuI5S7pBLA

item.title: CloneDanceParty — episode page draft
item.description:
I think the negative reaction from the community kind of seeped into your, you're, you're like, your comments about it, but it didn't really hit it in your ratings until maybe later. I could have sworn that like two or three episodes ago they said it a computer sending up the data to various scientific journals and newspaper publications about everything that died had been up to and that was the sort of like. I th...
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/clonedanceparty-local-arts-coverage-and-why-criticism-still-matters.html

item.title: bliptv-20131014-110547-Cgbenzine-DanceDanceDanceDance715 — review-first episode page hold

item.title: travelogue-media-podcast-interview-heather-robles 2 — episode page draft
item.description:
We very often in the United States tend to be in a silo, especially where I live in New York. It's very important to the company that I'm dancing with right now, Suzanne Pana-Marinco-Dance. So to step outside of that and to connect with people around the world, it expands my sense of the world of my community and communities very important to me.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/travelogue-media-podcast-interview-heather-robles-2-interview-notes-and.html

item.title: Me Behind This Exuberant Dance Number Planning, Precision, and Practice — episode page draft
item.description:
Mandy Moore borrows some steps from this classic Freda Stair and Ginger Rogers routine from the 1935 film top hat. because there was no money to fix colors by computer in post-production, and the director wanted the sunset colors to be just right. Watching her star as natural movements, basing her dances on those movements and shaping them toward grace and fluidity.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/me-behind-this-exuberant-dance-number-planning-precision-and-practice.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NT_nElROGgk

item.title: Picking Up Choreography After Years of Salsa — episode page draft
item.description:
If you've done some dance before picking up the basics of the choreography, wasn't it too bad, I think I'm mostly got it. So I'm pretty good at picking up choreography and then I'll watch dance moves on YouTube and copy them. I have been doing salsa for the past 10-plus years.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-after-years-of-salsa.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go6-Bcv4sG4

item.title: Heartbeat podcast lane smoke — episode page draft
item.description:
This is a short calm audio-only smoke test for the podcast-first lane. It should create an article, a podcast episode destination, an email handoff, and a YouTube support path without needing a manual destination override.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/heartbeat-podcast-lane-smoke-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T_nMZXBHlNE

item.title: Intro for restorative yoga — episode page draft
item.description:
This practice is designed to help your body and mind release the weight of the day, to soften the tension you've been holding and reconnect to a steady peaceful rhythm within. We'll move gently using supportive props and longer holds to invite the nervous system into balance. Hi friends, and welcome to Devanna Yoga and Wellness.
